name: Kwitiaow Pad Thai
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Preserved sweet white radish, chopped
11 oz Rice noodles (sen kel or woon sen), soaked in cold water for 7-10 minutes if dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the sauce ingredients together (water, tamarind juice, palm sugar, white soya sauce) in a pan and bring to a boil. Reduce the mixture to about 2/3 cup and set aside.
2. Heat oil in a wok or pan until very hot. Add prawns and bean curd, stirring lightly for 1 minute.
3. Add preserved radish and shallots, frying for another minute.
4. Break in eggs and stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Add noodles and chicken stock. Cook the noodles until soft (about 2 minutes).
6. Stir in dried shrimps, peanuts, spring onions, and bean sprouts.
7. Pour in the sauce and continue frying for a couple of minutes.
8. Serve with chopped peanuts, dried chillies, sugar, lime wedges, sliced spring onions, and fresh bean sprouts in small containers.
